faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: What businesses most often wonder before working with us.

q1.q: Will this really bring me new customers?
q1.a: Honestly: a nice website alone won't bring customers. What matters is that you get found and that visitors turn into inquiries. That's exactly what we build the foundation for — visible on Google, an appearance that convinces, and automated follow-up so no inquiry slips away. If we're not convinced it will measurably pay off for you, we'll tell you openly in the first call.

q2.q: How much effort is it for me — and how fast does it go?
q2.a: Very little. You give us a few basics like your logo and key details, and we handle the rest: copy, design and tech. Thanks to AI-powered production it's fast — many websites are live in under two weeks, with first visibility effects often showing shortly after.

q3.q: What does it cost — and are there hidden fees?
q3.a: No hidden fees, no nasty surprises. As a rule you pay once for your project; maintenance and care are optional if you want them. Exactly what makes sense for you we discuss in the free first call — you only pay for what genuinely benefits you.

q4.q: Do I own the website — and am I tied in long-term?
q4.a: Yes, your website belongs to you. We work without lock-in contracts: the only commitment is optional ongoing maintenance — and that's cancellable anytime. You stay because the results are right, not because of a clause.

q5.q: Are my data and my customers' data safe?
q5.a: Yes. We work in full GDPR compliance — a must especially for practices and sensitive industries. Your data and your customers' data are safe with us and are only used for what they're meant for.

q6.q: Why Alps Agency — and what's my risk?
q6.a: We combine real AI with honest, personal marketing: fast to launch, transparent and location-independent in several languages. You're always looked after personally, not by a bot. Your risk: none — the first call is free and non-binding. Get to know us and decide afterwards at your own pace.
